text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ack... Despite my best efforts, the<n>result of my last
race was far too<n>pitiful to offer unto Shiraoki...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: But today... I will definitely win!
choice_data_list: It's great that you're taking this so seriously.
It's great that you're taking this so seriously.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
As they say, "Even the patience of a<n>saint has
limits!" If I lose again, who<n>knows what kind of
punishment<n>Shiraoki will bring upon me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's why I've made extra sure<n>that things will
work out this time! I<n>positioned my pillow in an
auspicious<n>direction, visited the shrine a hundred
times, and drew fortune slips until I<n>got "great
fortune"!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
With confidence and luck on my side,<n>I'm sure to
win!
